# Konyak compatibility profile

Declarative compatibility rules for a Windows program in Konyak.

> This reference is generated from the runtime JSON Schema. Do not edit it by hand.

- Schema version: `1`
- Canonical schema: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/serika12345/Konyak/main/packages/konyak_cli/profiles/profile.schema.json>
- JSON Schema dialect: <https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema>

## Root object

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/$schema` | yes | `string` | constant: `"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/serika12345/Konyak/main/packages/konyak_cli/profiles/profile.schema.json"` | Canonical JSON Schema URI used to identify and validate this profile format. |
| `/schemaVersion` | yes | `integer` | constant: `1` | Version of the complete compatibility-profile document contract. |
| `/id` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `1`; pattern: `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_.-]*$` | Stable lowercase identifier for the install profile. |
| `/name` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `1` | Human-readable profile name shown by Konyak. |
| `/profileVersion` | yes | `integer` | minimum: `1`; maximum: `999999` | Monotonically increasing revision of this install profile. |
| `/summary` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `1` | Short human-readable explanation of the profile's purpose. |
| `/platforms` | yes | `array` | minimum items: `1`; items must be unique; item type: `enum`; item allowed: `"macos"`, `"linux"` | Hosts the profile is intended for. childProcessRules and installerCompletion are currently effective on macOS only. |
| `/windowsVersion` | yes | `enum` | allowed: `"winxp64"`, `"win7"`, `"win8"`, `"win81"`, `"win10"`, `"win11"` | Windows compatibility mode configured for the managed bottle. |
| `/managedProgramPath` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `8`; pattern: `^[Cc]:[\\/](?:(?!\.{1,2}(?:[\\/]\|$))[^\u0000\\/]+[\\/])*(?!\.{1,2}$)[^\u0000\\/]+\.[Ee][Xx][Ee]$` | Absolute Windows path of the executable Konyak manages after installation. |
| `/installerResource` | yes | `object` | unknown fields rejected | Immutable HTTPS source for the Windows installer executed by profile installation. |
| `/installerCompletion` | no | `object` | unknown fields rejected | Optional completion behavior for an installer that leaves one known child executable running after installation has finished. |
| `/preInstallActions` | yes | `array<variant>` | maximum items: `64`; item type: `variant` | Ordered declarative actions applied before the Windows installer is launched. |
| `/runCompletionPolicy` | yes | `enum` | allowed: `"waitForExit"`, `"launchOnly"` | Whether a managed launch waits for the Windows process to exit or completes after launch. |
| `/compatibilityProfile` | yes | `object` | unknown fields rejected | Runtime compatibility rules applied when launching the managed program. |

## Object `/installerResource`

Immutable HTTPS source for the Windows installer executed by profile installation.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/installerResource/kind` | yes | `string` | constant: `"https"` | Resource transport discriminator; schema version 1 accepts HTTPS only. |
| `/installerResource/url` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `9`; maximum length: `8192`; pattern: `^https://[^/?#@\u0000-\u0020\u007f]+(?:[/?][^#\u0000-\u0020\u007f]*)?$` | HTTPS URL from which Konyak downloads the installer. |
| `/installerResource/sha256` | yes | `string` | pattern: `^[0-9A-Fa-f]{64}$` | Expected SHA-256 digest of the downloaded installer, encoded as 64 hexadecimal characters. |
| `/installerResource/fileName` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `5`; maximum length: `255`; pattern: `^[^/\\\u0000-\u001f\u007f]+\.(?:[Ee][Xx][Ee]\|[Mm][Ss][Ii])$` | A basename ending in .exe or .msi; path separators and control characters are forbidden. |

## Object `/installerCompletion`

Optional completion behavior for an installer that leaves one known child executable running after installation has finished.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/installerCompletion/ignoreChildExecutable` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `5`; maximum length: `255`; pattern: `^[^/\\\u0000-\u001f\u007f]+\.[Ee][Xx][Ee]$` | A safe Windows .exe basename whose continued execution does not keep installer completion waiting. |

## Variant `/preInstallActions/*` — kind = "winetricks"

Runs one named winetricks verb in the managed bottle.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/preInstallActions/*/kind` | yes | `string` | constant: `"winetricks"` | Pre-install action discriminator for a winetricks verb. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/verb` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `1`; maximum length: `128`; pattern: `^[A-Za-z0-9_.+-]+$` | Winetricks verb passed through Konyak's managed winetricks execution path. |

## Variant `/preInstallActions/*` — kind = "nativeDll"

Downloads a verified native DLL and installs it into the architecture-matched Windows system directory.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/preInstallActions/*/kind` | yes | `string` | constant: `"nativeDll"` | Pre-install action discriminator for a native DLL. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/componentId` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `1`; maximum length: `128`; pattern: `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_.-]*$` | Stable identifier for the native component installed by this action. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/machine` | yes | `enum` | allowed: `"x86"`, `"x64"` | Machine architecture of the downloaded DLL. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/destination` | yes | `enum` | allowed: `"windowsSysWow64"`, `"windowsSystem32"` | Managed Windows system directory receiving the DLL. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/targetFileName` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `5`; maximum length: `255`; pattern: `^[^/\\\u0000-\u001f\u007f]+\.[Dd][Ll][Ll]$` | Safe DLL basename used at the managed destination. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/resource` | yes | `object` | unknown fields rejected | Immutable HTTPS source for the native DLL payload. |

Additional alternatives:

- An x86 DLL must be installed into windowsSysWow64.
- An x64 DLL must be installed into windowsSystem32.

## Object `/preInstallActions/*/resource`

Immutable HTTPS source for the native DLL payload.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/preInstallActions/*/resource/kind` | yes | `string` | constant: `"https"` | Resource transport discriminator; schema version 1 accepts HTTPS only. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/resource/url` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `9`; maximum length: `8192`; pattern: `^https://[^/?#@\u0000-\u0020\u007f]+(?:[/?][^#\u0000-\u0020\u007f]*)?$` | HTTPS URL from which Konyak downloads the DLL. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/resource/sha256` | yes | `string` | pattern: `^[0-9A-Fa-f]{64}$` | Expected SHA-256 digest of the downloaded DLL, encoded as 64 hexadecimal characters. |
| `/preInstallActions/*/resource/fileName` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `5`; maximum length: `255`; pattern: `^[^/\\\u0000-\u001f\u007f]+\.[Dd][Ll][Ll]$` | Safe source basename ending in .dll. |

## Object `/compatibilityProfile`

Runtime compatibility rules applied when launching the managed program.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/compatibilityProfile/id` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `1`; pattern: `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_.-]*$` | Stable lowercase identifier for this compatibility-rule set. |
| `/compatibilityProfile/profileVersion` | yes | `integer` | minimum: `1`; maximum: `999999` | Monotonically increasing revision of the compatibility-rule set. |
| `/compatibilityProfile/childProcessRules` | yes | `array<object>` | maximum items: `64`; item type: `object`; item unknown fields rejected | Rules for appending missing arguments to matching Windows child processes. Implemented by the Konyak macOS Wine runtime only in schema version 1; Linux does not yet propagate or apply these rules. |

## Array item `/compatibilityProfile/childProcessRules/*`

Arguments appended when a matching child executable does not already contain them.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/compatibilityProfile/childProcessRules/*/executableSuffix` | yes | `string` | minimum length: `1`; maximum length: `1024`; pattern: `^[\u0020-\u007e]+$` | Printable ASCII suffix matched case-insensitively against the child executable path. |
| `/compatibilityProfile/childProcessRules/*/appendArgumentsIfMissing` | yes | `array<string>` | minimum items: `1`; maximum items: `64`; items must be unique; item type: `string`; item minimum length: `1`; item maximum length: `8192`; item pattern: `^[^\u0000\u0009\u000a\u000d\u0020\u0022]+$` | Unique arguments appended to the matched child command line only when absent. |

## Conditional constraints

- installerCompletion may be declared only when every target platform is macOS.

## Additional semantic validation

These rules are enforced after JSON Schema validation by Konyak's Dart domain model.

| Rule ID | Instance path | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `pre-install-actions.unique-winetricks-verbs` | `/preInstallActions` | Winetricks verbs must not be repeated within one profile. |
| `pre-install-actions.unique-native-dll-targets` | `/preInstallActions` | Native DLL actions must not target the same destination and case-insensitive target file name more than once. |
| `child-process-rules.non-blank-executable-suffix` | `/compatibilityProfile/childProcessRules/*/executableSuffix` | An executable suffix must contain at least one non-whitespace printable ASCII character. |
| `child-process-rules.total-argument-limit` | `/compatibilityProfile/childProcessRules` | All child-process rules together may contain at most 64 appended arguments. |
| `child-process-rules.serialized-length-limit` | `/compatibilityProfile/childProcessRules` | The serialized child-process rule set must not exceed 65535 UTF-16 code units. |
